scope: Start the first real discovery collection tranche in the security/compliance cluster and validate it through the pilot flow

decision_context.prior_state: The repo had the full pilot scaffold, materialized cluster files, progress tracking, and merge/canonicalize plumbing, but no real collected candidates yet.
decision_context.decision: Fill the first three security-cluster agents with evidence-grounded candidates, refresh the cluster bundle from the materialized directory, canonicalize the partial pilot result, and run a bounded hybrid validation pass.
decision_context.why_now: The next truthful step after all the pilot plumbing was to start actual collection in one cluster and see whether the first tranche survives intake and early MiroFish validation.

files_expected.purpose: Adds the bundle rebuild step needed after editing the materialized cluster directory.
Covers rebuilding the combined bundle from the materialized directory.
Stores the first three evidence-grounded security-cluster candidate submissions.
Stores the canonicalized partial pilot result after the first collection tranche.
Stores the bounded hybrid validation run for the first security tranche.

planned_steps: Fill the first security-cluster agents with grounded candidates
Refresh the combined cluster bundle from the materialized directory
Merge and canonicalize the partial pilot result
Run a bounded hybrid validation pass and save the diagnostic/promotion read

commands: $env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m chip_labs.cli mirofish-discovery-program-progress --input-dir research/meta/mirofish_discovery_pilot_100_clusters_2026-03-24 --output research/meta/MIROFISH_DISCOVERY_PROGRAM_PILOT_100_PROGRESS_2026-03-24.json --markdown-output research/meta/MIROFISH_DISCOVERY_PROGRAM_PILOT_100_PROGRESS_2026-03-24.md --title "MiroFish Discovery Pilot 100 Progress"
$env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m pytest tests/test_mirofish_discovery.py tests/test_watchtower.py tests/test_mirofish_portfolio.py tests/test_trend_prediction.py -q
expected_checks: The pilot progress snapshot shows 3 filled agents and 3 raw candidates
The partial pilot result accepts all three first-tranche candidates as clear_domain_chip
The hybrid validation still holds the tranche in frontier rather than promoting it
The focused regression suite stays green

guardrails: Do not treat the first three accepted candidates as a completed pilot or promotion-ready result
Preserve the evidence-grounded distinction between real collected candidates and unfilled cluster slots
Rerun the bundle rebuild step after editing the materialized directory so merge reads the current cluster state
